name: GithubBoardMoovements
description:
Tool to moove ticket on the board (change status). The moveIssueToStatus tool has 4 explicit input parameters under variables:

projectId — board node ID
itemId — from board_item_id in the trigger payload
fieldId — Status field node ID
optionId — target status (name→ID map in description)
The query field has a default value with the fixed mutation — the agent doesn't need to touch it.
